channel.title: Jupter on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Jupter on Margrop Blog

item.title: Python3 web environment, including third-party and self-built
item.description: I needed to use the Python3 Web environment because of some family matters, so I collected them. The environment of the third-party website is very simple to use, but the shortcomings are also obvious. The last Python code cannot be saved. Python3 environment provided by third-party websites So I built an environment myself, and after struggling for a long time, I finally used Docker to build it, and it was done in just a few lines of code.
